svg.title: Skill Manager logo, refined lockup
svg.desc: Refined horizontal lockup. Custom-drawn square brackets with subtle pixel-style outer chamfers flank a small amber rounded-corner square at the bracket mark's center. To the right, a monospace wordmark sets skill and manager separated by a second identical amber rounded square. The two amber squares align at x-height center and share the same geometry as the favicon's grid cells, unifying the system.

text.style: font-family: 'Berkeley Mono', 'JetBrains Mono', 'Fira Code', 'IBM Plex Mono', 'Cascadia Code', 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, monospace; font-size: 44px; font-weight: 500;;fill:rgb(20, 20, 19);stroke:none;color:rgb(0, 0, 0);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:"Berkeley Mono", "JetBrains Mono", "Fira Code", "IBM Plex Mono", "Cascadia Code", "Geist Mono", ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, monospace;font-size:44px;font-weight:500;text-anchor:start;dominant-baseline:auto
